spec_match.rationale: Accurately validates all primary schema structures of .well-known/related-website-set.json manifests (primary, associatedSites, serviceSites, ccTLDs) and asserts HTTPS scheme safety rules.

interactive.rationale: Contains a text editor box, click controllers to load valid/invalid configurations, and a Validate button that outputs parser errors, warnings, and mapping tables in real-time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent description: lets users paste manifests, validates them, shows active vs deprecated fields, and displays a migration guide.

edge_cases.rationale: Properly captures malformed JSON structures using robust try-catch blocks to prevent the browser validation logic from crashing.

references.rationale: The page now includes a see-also section with the required ChromeStatus entry, the RWS repository, and migration references.

design_system.rationale: Conforms perfectly using standard fonts, custom buttons, borders, cards, and breadcrumbs.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: A clean educational utility that validates RWS JSON manifests, reports realistic deprecation warnings, and now includes the required ChromeStatus and migration references.
